label: Automatic differentiation & backpropagation

node.label: Automatic differentiation & backpropagation
node.definition: Gradients are propagated through composed computation graphs to assign credit to parameters.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Automatic differentiation & backpropagation is to connect Calculus & automatic differentiation theory, Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations to downstream capabilities including Distributed, mixed-precision & memory-efficient training.

limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Calculus & automatic differentiation theory, Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations.
